title: RapidMeta Rheumatology | IL-23 Inhibitors in Psoriatic Arthritis (NMA) v1.0
hero_h2: IL-23 Inhibitors in Active Psoriatic Arthritis (Risankizumab + Guselkumab)

pico.pop: Adults with active psoriatic arthritis (>=5 swollen + >=5 tender joints, active plaque psoriasis), conventional-synthetic-DMARD inadequate response (KEEPsAKE-1, DISCOVER-2 biologic-naive) or biologic-IR (KEEPsAKE-2, DISCOVER-1 biologic-experienced)
pico.int: Anti-IL-23p19 monoclonal antibody: risankizumab 150 mg SC week 0, 4, then Q12W (KEEPsAKE-1, KEEPsAKE-2) or guselkumab 100 mg SC week 0, 4, then Q4W or Q8W (DISCOVER-1, DISCOVER-2)
pico.comp: Placebo on top of stable csDMARD background therapy
pico.out: ACR20 response (>=20% improvement in ACR composite) at week 24 (primary in all four trials; RR vs placebo)
pico.subgroup: Prior biologic exposure (naive vs IR), baseline csDMARD use, baseline tender / swollen joint counts, enthesitis / dactylitis status, BSA

real_data_entries.name: KEEPsAKE-1
real_data_entries.group: Risankizumab 150 mg SC vs placebo in active PsA, csDMARD-IR; primary ACR20 at week 24

allOutcomes.title: ACR20 at week 24 (primary; RR vs placebo + csDMARD)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Kristensen LE et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2022 (KEEPsAKE-1 risankizumab PsA, csDMARD-IR).

real_data_entries.name: KEEPsAKE-2
real_data_entries.group: Risankizumab 150 mg SC vs placebo in active PsA, biologic-IR or csDMARD-IR; primary ACR20 at week 24

allOutcomes.title: ACR20 at week 24 (primary; RR vs placebo + csDMARD)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Östör A et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2022 (KEEPsAKE-2 risankizumab PsA, biologic-IR).

real_data_entries.name: DISCOVER-1
real_data_entries.group: Guselkumab 100 mg SC Q8W vs placebo in active PsA (biologic-naive or anti-TNF IR); primary ACR20 at week 24

allOutcomes.title: ACR20 at week 24 (primary; RR vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Deodhar A et al. Lancet 2020;395:1115-1125 (DISCOVER-1 guselkumab PsA).

real_data_entries.name: DISCOVER-2
real_data_entries.group: Guselkumab 100 mg SC Q8W vs placebo in biologic-naive active PsA; primary ACR20 at week 24

allOutcomes.title: ACR20 at week 24 (primary; RR vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Mease PJ et al. Lancet 2020;395:1126-1136 (DISCOVER-2 guselkumab PsA, biologic-naive).
